name: Deployment Result to Plane and Slack
purpose: Update Plane and Slack after the GitHub Actions deploy-after-merge workflow finishes.

security.recommended: Validate X-Hub-Signature-256 using the GitHub webhook secret stored in n8n credentials.

nodes.name: CONFIG
nodes.notes: First workflow node after the trigger. Store all shared constants here instead of n8n global variables.

values.slack_deploy_channel: Slack channel for deployment result messages

nodes.name: Deploy workflow completed
nodes.condition: workflow_run.name equals Deploy After Merge and workflow_run.status equals completed

outputs.plane_issue_id: Plane issue ID recovered from merged PR body, issue body, or commit metadata
outputs.github_issue_number: GitHub source issue number recovered from merged PR body

nodes.name: Find merged PR for deployment SHA
Resolve Plane task from PR or issue metadata
Move Plane task to Done
nodes.condition: conclusion equals success and plane_issue_id exists
nodes.request: Use Plane API to move task to Done and add deployment run link.

nodes.name: Comment GitHub Issue Completed
nodes.condition: conclusion equals success and github_issue_number exists
nodes.request: Add a completion comment with PR URL, deployment run URL, and commit SHA.
nodes.on_error: Continue to Slack notification; issue closure is secondary to Plane status.

nodes.name: Close GitHub Issue Completed
nodes.condition: conclusion equals success and github_issue_number exists
nodes.request: Edit issue state to closed with state_reason completed.
nodes.on_error: Continue to Slack notification; issue closure is secondary to Plane status.

nodes.name: Move Plane task to Blocked or Failed
nodes.condition: conclusion is not success and plane_issue_id exists
nodes.request: Use Plane API to move task to Blocked/Failed and add deployment run link.

nodes.name: Send deployment result
nodes.on_error: Respond 502 so GitHub webhook delivery can be retried.

safe_failure_handling: Only process completed Deploy After Merge workflow runs.
If Plane cannot be resolved, still notify Slack with the deployment result and run URL.
If Plane update fails, Slack message must include manual repair instructions.
Close the linked GitHub issue only after a successful deploy and resolved GitHub issue number.
Do not close linked GitHub issues on failed deploys.
Never deploy from n8n; n8n only reacts to GitHub Actions deployment results.
Use GitHub webhook retries for transient Slack or Plane API failures.
